ingredients.name: ground beef
examples: 1 lb. of extra lean ground beef

ingredients.name: cheddar cheese
examples: 1 1/2 c (6 oz.) shredded Cheddar cheese, divided

ingredients.name: oil
examples: 1/2 c. oil (I use olive oil, extra light)

ingredients.name: peanut butter
examples: 2 Tbsp. peanut butter or more if you would like

ingredients.name: garlic powder
examples: 1/8 tsp. garlic powder or 1 clove garlic, minced

ingredients.name: olive oil
examples: 3 Tbsp. bacon drippings or olive oil
1/2 c. Wesson oil or 1/4 c. olive oil and 1/4 c. Wesson oil

ingredients.name: orange juice
examples: 1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice, thawed
1 (6 oz.) can frozen orange juice concentrate, thawed

ingredients.name: black pepper
examples: 1 tsp. black pepper (you may wish to use less)

ingredients.name: strawberry
examples: 1 10 oz. frozen strawberries or 2 c. fresh

ingredients.name: bread crumb
examples: 1 c. bread crumbs or oat bran cereal

ingredients.name: cheese
examples: 1 to 2 c. cheese of your choice

ingredients.name: cream of mushroom soup
examples: 1 (10 oz.) can cream of mushroom soup
1 (10 3/4 oz.) can condensed cream of mushroom soup (undiluted)
1 can (10 3/4 oz.) cream of mushroom soup
1 (10 1/2 oz.) can cream of mushroom soup

ingredients.name: mandarin orange
examples: 1 large or 2 small cans mandarin oranges

ingredients.name: tomato paste
examples: 1 1/2 c. drained canned tomatoes or 1/4 tomato paste

ingredients.name: cream of chicken soup
examples: 1 (10 oz.) can cream of chicken soup
1 can cream of chicken soup (not diluted)
1 can cream of chicken soup (diluted with milk)
1 (10 1/2 oz.) can cream of chicken soup

ingredients.name: mozzarella cheese
examples: 1/2 c. (2 oz.) shredded part-skim Mozzarella cheese

ingredients.name: apple
examples: 6 c. sliced and peeled apples (slice thin)

ingredients.name: pimento
examples: 1 large jar pimento, drained and diced

ingredients.name: kidney bean
examples: 1 c. kidney beans, cooked and drained
1 can kidney beans, rinsed and drained

ingredients.name: stalks celery
examples: 8 or more stalks of celery, chopped

ingredients.name: pea
examples: 1 pkg. (10 oz.) frozen peas, cooked and drained

ingredients.name: water chestnut
examples: 1 (8 oz.) can sliced water chestnuts, drained

ingredients.name: pineapple chunk
examples: 1 (20 oz.) can pineapple chunks, drained (reserve juice)

ingredients.name: olive
examples: 1 (2 1/4 oz.) can sliced ripe olives, drained

ingredients.name: kernel corn
examples: 1 (16 oz.) can whole kernel corn, drained
1 - 7 ounce can whole kernel corn, drained

ingredients.name: curry powder
examples: 4 oz. curry powder (we use Javin Brand)

ingredients.name: spinach
examples: 2 boxes frozen, chopped spinach (thaw and press all excess liquid from spinach)
1 pkg. frozen spinach, cooked and drained

ingredients.name: semi sweet chocolate chip
examples: 1 (12 oz.) pkg. (2 c.) semi-sweet chocolate chips

ingredients.name: onion powder
examples: 3 tsp. onion powder or 1 large onion

ingredients.name: cream of celery soup
examples: 2 (10 1/2) cans condensed cream of celery soup
10.75 oz. can cream of celery soup

ingredients.name: flaked coconut
examples: 2 (6 oz.) pkg. shredded or flaked coconut

ingredients.name: sherry
examples: 1/8 c. dry sherry (or more, if desired)

ingredients.name: sausage
examples: 1 lb. sausage (link, Polish, Italian, kielbasi or ground, browned or precooked)

ingredients.name: jalapeno pepper
examples: 1 or 2 small jalapeno peppers, seeded and minced

ingredients.name: chicken stock
examples: 1 qt. chicken stock (3 cans Campbell's chicken stock)
3 c. chicken stock or vegetable stock

ingredients.name: oreo cooky
examples: 24 crushed Oreo cookies (do not remove filling)

ingredients.name: monterey jack cheese
examples: 1 1/4 c. (5 oz.) shredded Monterey Jack cheese

ingredients.name: red kidney bean
examples: 4 cans red kidney beans, drained and rinsed

ingredients.name: pimiento
examples: 1 small jar pimiento, chopped and drained

ingredients.name: vanilla pudding mix
examples: 2 (4 oz.) pkg. vanilla instant pudding mix
1 pkg. instant vanilla pudding mix (4 serving size)
1 (3 3/4 or 3 5/8 oz.) pkg. instant vanilla pudding mix

ingredients.name: pork chop
examples: 2 to 2 1/2 lb. pork chops (4 to 6 chops, 3/4-inch thick)

ingredients.name: sharp cheese
examples: 1 1/2 c. grated medium or sharp cheese

ingredients.name: bacon crumbled
examples: 12 sliced bacon, cooked, crumbled and divided
8 to 10 slices bacon, cooked, drained and crumbled

ingredients.name: chocolate pudding
examples: 1 (4 serving size) pkg. chocolate instant pudding

ingredients.name: pet milk
examples: 1 (12 oz.) can pet milk (can use fat free)

ingredients.name: hamburger meat
examples: 1 1/4 lb. hamburger meat or less (if desired)

ingredients.name: chunk pineapple
examples: 1 (15 oz.) can crushed or chunk pineapple, drained

ingredients.name: egg noodle
examples: 1 (8 oz.) pkg. egg noodles, cooked and drained

ingredients.name: jell
examples: 2 (3 oz.) pkg. Jell-O (mixed fruit or strawberry-banana)
